title: melica trebinjensis
intro: Melica trebinjensis, also known as Balkan melic grass, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Melica trebinjensis include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in the digestion process, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, Melica trebinjensis can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or dried and taken as a supplement to reap its medicinal benefits.
